title: FLOTUS cheers Biden's 'great job' at debate
shortDescription: First lady Jill Biden applauded President Biden for his debate performance against Donald Trump despite widespread criticism.

title: When will Biden, Trump meet again for second debate?
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump will meet again in the second presidential debate, hosted by ABC News in September.

title: Voters react to first presidential debate
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump faced off in Atlanta for the first presidential debate ahead of the 2024 election.

title: Pres. Joe Biden visits Waffle House after debate
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and first lady Jill Biden stopped by an Atlanta Waffle House after the president's debate against Donald Trump.

title: President Joe Biden goes to Atlanta area Waffle House after debate
shortDescription: The visit came after the highly anticipated debate against former president Donald Trump.

title: Trump-Biden debate: Reactions from late night, morning hosts
shortDescription: Both late night and morning show hosts reacted to the debate between President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump, the first of the election.

title: Swing state voters exhausted, disgusted by Biden-Trump debate
shortDescription: A Nevada voter described Joe Biden's performance as elder abuse. A Georgia voter left early to buy beer. The first debate went about as expected.

title: No public release of Trump jurors' party affiliations | Fact check
shortDescription: It's impossible to know how the jurors voted politically. Attorneys weren't allowed to ask them, and their identities were protected from the public.

title: Allies close ranks behind Joe Biden in wake of debate fail
shortDescription: Biden struggled at times to find the words he wanted in Thursday's debate, reinforcing concerns about his age.

title: Politicos go to bat for Trump, Biden in spin room
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump and sitting President Joe Biden go head-to-head in first presidential debate in Atlanta.

title: Is a reckoning afoot for Biden after he falters in debate with Trump?
shortDescription: Team Biden wanted an early debate to shake up the presidential race. This one did, but not in the way they wanted.

title: Biden stumbles in debate, candidates clash on abortion: 5 takeaways
shortDescription: President Joe Biden failed to assuage concerns about his age when he misspoke in his first 2024 debate with former President Donald Trump.

title: Biden attacks Trump for saying Hitler 'did a lot of good things.' Did Trump say this?
shortDescription: During the CNN Presidential debate, Biden attacked Trump for saying Hitler "did a lot of good things," while talking about what happened in Charlottesville in 2017. Did Trump say this?

title: Americans react to Trump-Biden debate
shortDescription: Watch parties across the United States show Americans react to the first Trump-Biden presidential debate of the 2024 election.

title: Biden, Trump close debate by calling each other 'children'
shortDescription: Donald Trump and President Joe Biden toward the end of the first Presidential debate Thursday got into a spat of name-calling.

title: Obama advisor: There will be discussions about Biden continuing race
shortDescription: David Axelrod told CNN after the first debate there will be discussions over whether President Joe Biden should continue running in the 2024 race.

title: Donald Trump's VP race enters end game
shortDescription: Trump debate surrogates include oft-mentioned running mate possibilities: Doug Burgum, J.D. Vance, Tim Scott, and Marco Rubio of Florida.

title: Biden and Trump spiral into golf challenge during debate on age
shortDescription: Joe Biden and Donald Trump were answering questions on their age from CNN's Dana Bash when they challenged each other to a round of golf.

title: Biden supporters alarmed after president's debate struggles
shortDescription: Biden's voice was hoarse and raspy from the start. He stumbled over words and had to correct himself with numbers. He was sometimes hard to follow.

title: Trump, Biden discuss who's the better golfer during debate
shortDescription: An argument about golf was one of the few direct exchanges between the two candidates during the CNN presidential debate.

title: Biden, Trump point fingers over cognitive age
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump respond to concerns over their ages in the CNN Presidential Debate.

title: Who won the Biden-Trump debate? Age, fitness on stage
shortDescription: Donald Trump and Joe Biden squared off in the presidential debate. Biden's troubled performance took center stage.

title: Trump: I won’t block abortion pill
shortDescription: During the first presidential debate of 2024, Donald Trump says he won't block the abortions pill when asked about reporductive rights.
